name: Google Media Generation
description: Generate and edit images with Google Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image) and generate videos with Google Veo 3.1 via the Gemini API

credentials_required.label: Google Gemini API Key
credentials_required.hint: Free key at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey — works for both Nano Banana Pro and Veo 3.1

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt with Google Nano Banana Pro

tools.name: edit_image
tools.description: Edit a user-supplied image with a text prompt (Nano Banana Pro)

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a video from a text prompt with Google Veo 3.1 (polls up to 3 min, returns ready video or operation id)

tools.name: check_video_status
tools.description: Check status of a previously started Veo video generation by operation id, returns finished video when ready

author: freddy-schuetz
